titleStmt.title: SII 31.243: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 243. (A.R. No. B 295 of 1936.) MADDIKEṞA, PATTIKONDA TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up near the dhvaja-staṁbha in front of the temple of Māddamma.
This record is dated in the Śaka 1731, Śukla, Āśvija, śu. 10, corresponding to 1809 A.D. October 18, Wednesday.

Records that Mallikārjuna Nāyanivāru, son of Krishṇarāya and grandson of Dēvanakoṇḍa Ramappanāyanivāru made a new image of the goddess Mādhavi and got installed it in a temple at Maddikera as the original one is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vijayābhyu
daya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁ
bulu 1731 Aguna nēṭi pravarttar(ddha) Letter na redundent.
mānāthvyavaharika cāṁdramā
nēna śuklanāma saṁvvatsaraAśvīja
śuddha 10 mīlu śrīmanmahārāja śrīdēvana
koṁḍarāmappanāyanivāri pautṛlai(yna)
kṛṣṇarāyalavāri putṛlayina malli
kārjunanāyaṇi(ni)vāru vrāyiṁccina śāsanakama
meṭlananu pūrvamaṁdu māpeddalu maḍḍike
ralō śrīmāthavīdēvatanu cēyiṁci vuṁḍiriganu
ka madyakhilamaivuṁḍagā mēmu mā peddalaku
sukṛtaṁgānu jīrṇōddāraṁ dēvālayaṁ
dēvatanu cēyiṁci pratiṣṭha cēyiṁcināvamu yi
ṭanivrāyiṁcina dharmmaśāsanaṁ .
*) This inscription is engraved in florah design.
Digital edition of SII 31.243 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
